description: Typed lifecycle event subclasses extending AbstractLifecycleRunEvent. Each maps to a CoreLifecycleEventType constant.

files.responsibility: Base class for all lifecycle events — auto-fills type from static::TYPE constant.
AGENT_START — must be the first event in the stream.
AGENT_END — must be the final event in the stream.
TURN_START — opens a new turn scope.
TURN_END — closes the current turn scope.
MESSAGE_START — begins an LLM message emission.
MESSAGE_UPDATE — streaming delta for an in-progress message.
MESSAGE_END — completes a message, may indicate tool calls pending.
TOOL_EXECUTION_UPDATE — progress update during tool execution.
TOOL_EXECUTION_END — completes a tool execution with order_index.
